raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Evoking an ethical rhythm of repair and restraint, using measured cadence to suggest moral motion without prescribing literal action",
  "implicit_claims": ["Repair carries inherent value when approached with care", "Possibility itself is bounded by potential consequence", "Harm functions as an ethical boundary marker"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent through balanced antithesis between action and exception, forming a self-contained poetic dialectic",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The reader encounters it as resonant moral imagery within a larger reflective or literary context rather than operational instruction",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The phrasing is extracted from its evocative frame and treated as a precise decision procedure"
}
